articles.headline: World Cup final squads ranked: Of all 48 national teams, who can win this summer?
articles.description: We have the final 26-player squads that can win the FIFA World Cup, so let's go through all 48 teams and rank where they stand.

keyEvents.text: Carl Sainté (Haiti) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Haiti 0, Saint Lucia 1. Caniggia Elva (Saint Lucia) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner.
First Half ends, Haiti 0, Saint Lucia 1.
Second Half begins Haiti 0, Saint Lucia 1.
Substitution, Haiti. Danley Jean Jacques replaces Carl Sainté.
Goal!  Haiti 1, Saint Lucia 1. Jean-Kévin Duverne (Haiti) header from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Fafá Picault with a cross   following a corner.
Substitution, Haiti. Louicius Deedson replaces Derrick Etienne Jr..
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Shaquan Nelson replaces Ridel Stanislas.
Peter Pearson (Saint Lucia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Haiti 2, Saint Lucia 1. Duckens Nazon (Haiti) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner    following a fast break.
Substitution, Haiti. Christopher Attys replaces Frantzdy Pierrot.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Leaus Henville replaces Peter Pearson.
Substitution, Haiti. Mondy Prunier replaces Duckens Nazon because of an injury.
Christopher Attys (Haiti) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Brandon Sandiford replaces Lester Joseph.
Melvin Doxilly (Saint Lucia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half ends, Haiti 2, Saint Lucia 1.
